keys.title: BYO hosting addendum
keys.body:
**Version:** 1.0 (draft)

Applies to **Enterprise BYO** customers who operate their own ERP VM or cloud while using Vouus account portal, Work App, and API gateway.

## Vouus provides

- Account portal (billing, users, onboarding)
- Work App and Zuplo API integration
- Connector health monitoring (read-only where configured)

## Customer provides and operates

- ERP application VM or container host
- OS patching, ERP major upgrades, database backup
- Network path from Vouus gateway to your ERP endpoint

## Support boundaries

Platform support covers Vouus-controlled services. ERP upgrade execution on your infrastructure is **professional services** unless otherwise contracted.

## Credential tier

Enterprise BYO defaults to **Tier 2** credential policy. Infrastructure super-user credentials may be revealed after signing the Tier 2 addendum.
